summary: Autonomous propagation loop to populate BTC wallet

steps.title: Document propagation loop + receipts
steps.notes: Captured objectives, loop phases, automation surfaces, and measurement hooks in docs/impact/btc-wallet-propagation-loop.md so downstream work can execute against a concrete blueprint.

steps.title: Scaffold propagation runner + propagation receipts
steps.notes: Implement `tools/impact/propagate.py` (inventory/brief/apply), receipt schema under `_report/impact/propagation/`, and corresponding tests so propagation waves can be generated deterministically.

steps.title: Wire CTA surfaces + ledger summary + telemetry
steps.notes: Refresh README/Tier 1 CTAs, add ledger summary + propagation metrics to status/manager reports, and link ledger/contributor receipts so BTC inflow is observable.
